interpretation: Structural data quality is high (no nulls, no duplicates, no orphans), but three CRITICAL plan-fit issues block analysis as specified.

blocking_issues.title: support_tickets.category enum mismatch
blocking_issues.detail: Plan's complaint set ('bug_report','technical','billing') maps only 'billing' in actual data. Undocumented values 'bug' and 'usage_question' present.
blocking_issues.impact: Only 16 of 50 candidate complainer users retained under strict plan definition (78% lost).
blocking_issues.proposed_fix: Remap complaint set to ('bug','usage_question','billing') → 50 complainer users. User confirmation required.

blocking_issues.title: Time window outside data coverage
blocking_issues.detail: Plan window [2025-04-20, 2026-04-20) covers only 31/79 tickets. Actual data max: tickets=2025-06-06, events=2025-06-06, users=2025-06-17.
blocking_issues.impact: 61% of tickets excluded under current window.
blocking_issues.proposed_fix: Shift window to [2024-06-17, 2025-06-17] (last 12 months of snapshot).

blocking_issues.title: invoices.paid_at has no nulls — no unpaid variance
blocking_issues.detail: All 300 invoices are paid. H4's 'unpaid invoices → billing complaints' lift cannot be tested.
blocking_issues.proposed_fix: Drop H4 billing-arm; keep top-quartile-events arm for technical/bug complaints.

high_findings.title: Small n relative to plan thresholds
high_findings.detail: 50 complainer users / 135 non-complainers; plan/role segment cells ~8–30 each. Chi-square expected-counts may fall below 5.
high_findings.mitigation: Use Fisher's exact where any expected cell < 5. Relax n>=100 to n>=30 per group. Lower lift threshold from 1.5x to 1.3x. Report 95% CIs.

low_findings.title: accounts.plan is lowercase, schema examples are Title-case. Non-blocking.
users.role values ('admin','viewer','analyst') differ from schema example ('admin','member','viewer'). Non-blocking.
support_tickets.status has only 'open'/'closed' (schema documents 6 states). Not needed by plan.
